details.description: A five-story, late-19th/early-20th-century urban corner apartment block (murgård/leiegård) in Oslo. The stuccoed brick façade features a rusticated ground floor, horizontal string courses, pilasters, and tall rectangular windows with simple surrounds. Multiple stacked, wrought-iron balconies project along the main elevations and at the chamfered corner. The roofline is flat with a low parapet and chimneys. The scene is at a street intersection with parked cars, a blue parking sign, and a person riding an e-scooter. Evening light with a clear blue sky and a few trees at frame edge.

details.description: A Brighton-gray corner apartment building dominates a quiet Oslo street intersection. The five-story block features a symmetrical façade with decorative window surrounds, beige trim, and intricate stone-like detailing above windows. Numerous black wrought-iron balconies jut from each floor, including the rounded corner bays. The ground level shows large window openings and a solid base, while a flat roofline is crowned with a modest cornice. Cars are parked along both sides of the street and a few pedestrians pass by, including a person on a small electric scooter. The clear blue sky and soft late-day light highlight the building’s architectural ornamentation. The scene suggests a late 19th–early 20th-century European urban residential block, typical of Oslo’s Grünerløkka area.

details.description: Street-corner scene showing a multi-story late-19th/early-20th-century residential apartment block with a stuccoed façade, ornate window surrounds, and numerous wrought-iron balconies. The building is light gray with darker trim and has a shallow pitched roof with small chimneys. Ground floor windows are taller; upper floors have repetitive fenestration and decorative pilasters. A blue P parking sign stands by the curb. Several parked cars line the street; a person rides an electric scooter and a few pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. Early evening light under a clear blue sky; a streetlamp and spring foliage are visible on the right edge.

details.description: A large, multi-story corner building along a city street in Oslo. The facade is light-colored with decorative stone-like trim around the windows, pilasters, and cornices. Several ornate wrought-iron balconies extend from the upper floors. The building sits at an intersection with parked cars and pedestrians, under a clear blue sky, typical of a historic Oslo urban block (likely Grünerløkka).

details.description: A street-level photograph taken at dusk in the Grünerløkka district of Oslo, capturing a classic late 19th-century residential block. The sky is a vibrant blue with soft pink clouds, indicating twilight. The primary subject is a large, five-story corner apartment building (Marselis' gate 24) featuring a facade of reddish-brown brick interspersed with light plaster detailing, decorative window surrounds, and wrought-iron balconies. To the left, an adjacent building (Marselis' gate 26) with a darker brick facade is partially visible. The street (Marselis' gate) is paved with asphalt and lined with parked cars, including a silver station wagon and a white hatchback. On the sidewalk, a blue parking sign is visible. In the foreground, a person in a dark coat walks away from the camera, while another individual rides an electric scooter on the street near the intersection with Steenstrups gate.

details.description: A five-story corner apartment building in Oslo, Norway, showcasing late 19th-century historicist architecture. The facade features a mix of light-colored plaster on the lower levels and red brick with decorative stone window surrounds on the upper floors. Numerous balconies with ornate black wrought-iron railings are visible. The building is situated at the intersection of Marselis' gate and Thorvald Meyers gate in the Grünerløkka district. The photo is taken at dusk, with a clear blue sky and soft pink clouds. Several cars are parked along the street, and a pedestrian and a person on an electric scooter are in the foreground.

details.description: Oblique street-level view of a multi-story corner apartment block in a European city. The building has a richly articulated late-19th/early-20th-century facade combining light stone and red brick, with stacked oriel/bay windows on the corner and wrought-iron balcony railings. The ground floor shows a rusticated stone base; upper stories have tall rectangular windows with decorative lintels and projecting cornices. Several small iron Juliet balconies and enclosed bays punctuate the facade. Cars line the curb and a blue parking sign and a no-stopping sign are visible. The scene is taken at dusk/early evening with a clear sky, on a street intersection in a historic urban district.

details.description: A corner multi-story European-style apartment building with a pale stone facade, decorative cornices, and numerous sash windows. Some floors feature small wrought-iron balconies. The building sits on a tree-lined street with parked cars along the curb; a blue parking sign is visible near the corner. The street scene includes pedestrians and a sidewalk, suggesting an urban residential area. The sky is clear blue with a few wispy clouds. The photo appears to be taken from the opposite sidewalk, capturing the building's facade and corner elevation.

details.description: Street-corner view of a multi‑story European apartment block at dusk/early evening. The building has a light stone or stucco facade with brick accents, strong vertical window bays, several projecting oriel/bay windows with wrought‑iron railings, and a rusticated ground floor. Cars line the curb and a blue “P” parking sign stands near the corner. A person walks along the sidewalk while two riders pass on electric scooters. The sky is clear with faint clouds and spring foliage appears at the top left. The scene reads as a historic late‑19th/early‑20th‑century urban neighborhood intersection in Northern Europe.

details.description: A low-angle, vertical shot of a grand, multi-story residential building in an urban setting, likely taken in the evening or early morning given the soft blue sky and pink-tinged clouds. The image is rotated 90 degrees clockwise. The building features classic Nordic National Romantic or Jugendstil architecture with a light beige or cream facade, rusticated ground floor, and decorative elements such as wrought-iron balconies, window pediments, and a prominent cornice. The building sits on a street corner. Along the street (visible on the right side of the rotated image), several cars are parked, including a dark SUV with a visible license plate and a white sedan. A person in a dark coat stands near the cars, and another person is riding an electric scooter in the background. A blue parking sign with supplementary text is visible on the sidewalk. Trees with budding leaves are visible in the upper left corner, suggesting spring.

details.description: A street-level photograph, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise, showing a large, ornate corner apartment building in Oslo, Norway. The building features a mix of light-colored stone or plaster ornamentation and reddish-brown brickwork, typical of the late 19th-century Historicism style. It has multiple stories, decorative window pediments, and wrought-iron balconies. The scene is captured during the late afternoon, with soft light reflecting off the windows and a clear blue sky with faint pink clouds. Several cars are parked along the street, including a white Tesla Model 3 and a dark SUV with a Norwegian license plate (prefix 'DS', indicating Oslo). A person in dark clothing is walking on the sidewalk in the foreground. A blue parking sign with a 'P' and Norwegian text is visible near the corner.
